_comment: Copy this file to config.json and fill in your own values.
_obsidianBaseUrl: Base URL of Obsidian's 'Local REST API' plugin. Its HTTPS server defaults to 27124; enable the plain-HTTP localhost server for the simpler 27123 (no self-signed cert).
_obsidianApiKey: From Obsidian -> Settings -> Local REST API -> API Key.
_insecureTls: Set true only if obsidianBaseUrl uses https:// (the plugin ships a self-signed cert).
_vaultName: Exact vault name as shown in Obsidian, used to build obsidian:// deep links.
_actionItems: The bridge lists actionItemsFolder and uses the newest note whose name starts with actionItemsPrefix (filenames sort by their YYYYMMDD date).
_listenPort: Port the bridge listens on. The widget talks to this, not Obsidian directly.
